steps.expected: 200 OK and Set-Cookie headers for access and refresh tokens with httpOnly, SameSite flags
steps.observed: 200 OK, Set-Cookie returned with HttpOnly, SameSite=Lax. galileo_at (Max-Age=900, Path=/), galileo_rt (Max-Age=604800, Path=/auth/refresh). No tokens in JSON body.

evidence.network: POST /auth/login -> 200 OK. Cookies set: galileo_at (HttpOnly, SameSite=Lax, Max-Age=900), galileo_rt (HttpOnly, SameSite=Lax, Max-Age=604800). Note: Secure flag not set in dev (localhost), which is expected behavior.

steps.expected: Response body conforms to UserPublic type, no passwordHash or refreshToken
steps.observed: Response body contains only id, email, role, brandId, createdAt, updatedAt, brand. No secrets exposed.
galileo_at and galileo_rt cookies set in jar
200 OK. Set-Cookie: galileo_at=; Max-Age=0; Expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT. Set-Cookie: galileo_rt=; Max-Age=0; Expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT.
401 Unauthorized. Cookie jar was empty after logout.

evidence.network: POST /auth/logout -> 200 OK with expired cookies. GET /auth/me after -> 401.

steps.expected: New access and refresh tokens issued as cookies
steps.observed: 200 OK. New galileo_at (Max-Age=900) and galileo_rt (Max-Age=604800) cookies set.

evidence.network: POST /auth/refresh -> 200 OK. New Set-Cookie headers for galileo_at and galileo_rt. GET /auth/me -> 200 OK.

steps.action: OPTIONS preflight to /auth/me with Origin: http://localhost:3000
steps.observed: 204 No Content. access-control-allow-origin: http://localhost:3000, access-control-allow-credentials: true, access-control-allow-methods: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS

evidence.network: OPTIONS /auth/me -> 204 with Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true. GET /health -> 200 with same CORS headers.

frictions.description: API server was temporarily unavailable during initial subagent execution (likely killed by terminal-cli subagent for test isolation). Re-tested successfully after API restart.

summary: All 5 assertions passed. Cookie auth login, logout, refresh, UserPublic type, and CORS all working correctly.
